summary: Claude Opus 4.8 generally available — faster and higher-effort modes over Opus 4.7, same $5/$25 rate card.

analyst_note.author: Zerg AI
analyst_note.text: Third Opus release in seven weeks holding the same price — Anthropic keeps converting efficiency gains into capability instead of margin. The notable addition is fast mode at a separate $10/$50 rate: paying 2x per token for lower latency formalizes a latency-price axis that until now only existed informally via model-class downgrades. If your agent stack routes by task, fast mode is effectively a new routing target, not a new model.
